message:
fix(determinism): dereference hash slices before update in calibration sentinel

Fix two hasher.update() calls that passed borrowed references (&[u8])
instead of dereferenced slices (*h). Without dereference, the hash
computation would hash the pointer metadata rather than the actual
hash bytes, causing inconsistent fingerprints across runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
